zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan於1343年6月14日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾凱爾時，他的父親Robert II Stewart King of Scotland27歲，母親Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan23歲。他於1367年與Mariota MacKay在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1405年8月1日在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登享年62歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培爾登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan was born on 14 June 1343, in Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, was 23. He married Mariota MacKay in 1367, in Sutherland, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 August 1405, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan est né le 14 juin 1343, à Kyle, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mariota MacKay en 1367, à Sutherland, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 août 1405, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan è nato il il 14 giugno 1343 nel Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mariota MacKay nel 1367, nel Sutherland, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 agosto 1405, nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ko.Dunkeld Cathedral, Perthshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드 던켈드 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan(이)가 1343년 6월 14일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 키일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert II Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1367년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드에서 Mariota MacKay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 8월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 던켈드 던켈드 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan nasceu em 14 de junho de 1343, em Kyle, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert II Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariota MacKay em 1367, em Sutherland, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1405, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunkeld Cathedral, Dunkeld, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunkeld Cathedral, Perthshire, Scotland: дункелд кэтедраль, дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Stewart 1st Earl of Buchan родился 14 июня 1343 г. в местности кил, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert II Stewart King of Scotland было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mure of Rowallan, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariota MacKay в 1367 г. в местности сутирланд, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 августа 1405 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности дункелд кэтедраль, дункелд, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
